problem id: f376c085
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10001101 -> 11010111
  10101011 -> 11010101
  10100000 -> 01010100
  00110011 -> 10011111
  10011101 -> 11011111
  11011000 -> 01111111
  11110100 -> 01111110
  01101000 -> 00111101
  11010101 -> 11111010
  01111011 -> 10111111

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 11010101
